last_item.headline: Why this year’s wooden spooner is in the perfect spot to make a bombshell play for Zak Butters
last_item.body: At the conclusion of the 2026 AFL season, both Zak Butters and Zac Bailey will be restricted free agents and should theoretically have the same rights to explore their options in the league.In a practical sense, they quite demonstrably don’t.Bailey is, in effect, an unrestricted free agent.
